description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the cage1016/gitlab-ci-gcp:v1.5 Docker image and a global before_script that exports CLOUDSDK_CORE_DISABLE_PROMPTS=1, CLOUDSDK_PYTHON_SITEPACKAGES=1, GCP_PROJECT=gae-lab-001 and GCP_PROJECT_VERSION=uat. Define two stages, test and deploy. Add a test job in the test stage that runs the shell command `sh ./scripts/tests.sh`. Add a deploy job in the deploy stage that runs only on the master branch and executes `sh ./scripts/deploy.sh` to deploy the application to Google Cloud (App Engine).
